question: Tell us one ordinary happy day from your first year in America—from waking up through bedtime. Where did you go, what did you eat, who did you speak with, and what made the day feel new?
answer: My happiest time in America really it was in that small townhouse in Royal Oak Michigan. It was nice. I didn’t have a car but I have a bike I was on My Husband was going to the hospital to work from 7 o’clock in the morning until seven in the evening, I didn’t have nothing to do, but I was happy because.
